calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Feb-27-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing A Request For Probate Referee
Off Calendar Dec-12-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alisa Kim specially appearing for Allysia Holland for Brenda Burney Jackson.

The Court stated that it is waiting for a copy of the request to appoint probate referee with an order. Ms. Kim stated that she has it with her and will drop it off in Room 202. The status on filing a request for probate referee is off calendar.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Prado. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-05-2016 Continued To Feb-27-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Allysia Holland for and with (executor) Brenda Burney-Jackson.

The Court asked about the filing of the request for probate referee and Ms. Holland responded that she had filed it on Friday and would need 60 days to file the petition for final distribution. The status on filing a Petition for final distribution was continued to February 27, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-21-2016 Continued To Dec-05-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-17-2016 Continued To Nov-21-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Allysia Holland for (executor) Brenda Burney-Jackson.

Ms. Holland reported that she filed a substitution of attorney last week and that she will file the petition for final distribution in 30 days. The status on filing an inventory & appraisal and a petition for final distribution was continued to November 21, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-26-2016 Continued To Oct-17-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brenda Burney-Jackson in Propria Persona.

Ms. Jackson reported that she has found an attorney and will be meeting this Thursday. The Court stated that it will continue the matter, instructed Ms. Jackson to have the attorney file a substitution of attorney and asked about the real property. Ms. Jackson stated that one of her siblings is living in the property, that the sibling is paying the taxes and insurance but is not paying rent. The status on filing an Inventory & Appraisal and a petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration was continued to October 17, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Aug-15-2016 Continued To Sep-26-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brenda Burney-Jackson, petitioner in pro per.

Ms. Burney-Jackson informed the Court that today she had filed the inventory and appraisal, and that she was attempting to obtain legal counsel. The matter was continued to September 26, 2016 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204, for a status hearing re counsel and re filing the petition for final distribution.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Chan. (Not reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jul-11-2016 Continued To Aug-15-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brenda Burney-Jackson in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that letters were issued in September 2012, that the Inventory & Appraisal should have been filed within 4 months of that date and asked for the status. Ms. Burney-Jackson stated that she received the letter from the court 2 weeks ago, that she has obtained the forms and is prepared to present them today, confirmed that the money is still in the bank account and that they have set it aside for the benefit of the estate. The Court asked when she will be ready to distribute. Ms. Burney-Jackson stated that she would like to seek legal counsel, that she has the forms, bank statements and proof of taxes, that she has a pre-paid legal policy and will submit the forms today. The Court stated that progress has been made and continued the status of filing of Inventory & Appraisal; Petition for final distribution or Petition for approval of report on status of administration to August 15, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
